question: Show all client names and the number of orders each has made.
sql: SELECT Name, COUNT(IdOrder) AS NumOrders FROM Client LEFT JOIN Orders ON Client.IdClient = Orders.IdClient GROUP BY Name;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个客户下的订单数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求显示所有客户名称及其订单数量，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、表、列、聚合函数和分组字段均符合该要求。
